description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a clean, minimalist design, upholstered in a smooth, light-colored fabric. The sofa features three large seat cushions and a continuous backrest, both of which are topped with an array of seven loose throw pillows in white and beige tones. The armrests are broad, straight, and boxy, matching the overall geometric silhouette of the piece. The legs are short, dark, and slightly recessed, giving the sofa a low-profile appearance. The upholstery appears to be a solid, matte fabric with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. This sofa exudes a contemporary aesthetic suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, light-colored sofa with broad armrests, three seat cushions, and seven loose throw pillows in white and beige. The design is minimalist with a smooth, solid fabric and short, recessed legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, three seat cushions, and all seven throw pillows arranged along the backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, boxy armrest and the depth of the seat and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the tops of the throw pillows, with no visible decorative details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform seat cushions and a continuous backrest topped with seven loose throw pillows (five white, two beige) arranged in a single row; all cushions appear unattached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight, and boxy armrests at each end, matching the sofa's height and featuring a flat, unadorned profile with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, dark, and slightly recessed legs located at the corners, with a simple block style and no visible ornamentation.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, topped with loose throw pillows and lacking tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with a matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
